title: Is A World Gone Mad Still Investible Absolutely
section_path: Is A World Gone Mad Still Investible Absolutely
section_path_text: Is A World Gone Mad Still Investible Absolutely
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know
With two wars raging and key elections ahead, the world looks increasingly volatile. The fact that bad geopolitics are not reflected in the stock and bond market, where returns are good, is not a danger. In 150 years of financial history, the US stock market experienced only two non-finance-related crashes (1991 and 2020), both of which ended swiftly.
